steps.title: Identify the text's structure
steps.content: The passage describes a process in sequence: water is pumped when demand is low, stored, and then released when demand peaks to generate electricity. This step-by-step walkthrough of a mechanism—input, process, output—is the text's dominant structure.

steps.title: Match the structure to the purpose
steps.content:
Choice B directly matches what the passage does: it explains the basics of how a specific energy technology works.

Choices A, C, and D fail because the passage makes no comparison between energy methods, contains no persuasive language urging utilities to build more facilities, and doesn't discuss benefits versus drawbacks.

This matches choice B — B is correct.
